title: Kyoto University Generative AI Policy Evidence Draft - 2026-05-12
summary: Staged crawl found public official Kyoto University evidence for an education and learning AI initiative, student generative AI guidance, instructor policy and assessment guidance, information-security restrictions for generative AI inputs, and listed generative AI services. Claims remain staged agent-reviewed candidates only and are not canonical public conclusions.
limitations: This report draft is based only on public official pages fetched on 2026-05-12; login-limited Kyoto University portal content was not accessed.
This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Original Japanese source evidence is canonical; English display snippets are helper summaries only.
Staged claims are not human reviewed and must not be published as canonical claims without further review.
sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
